app.title: Polyant
dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Usage and cost analytics across all your AI assistants.
conversations.title: Conversations
conversations.subtitle: Browse and search conversation history.
conversations.empty.title: No conversations yet
conversations.empty.description: Conversations will appear here as users interact with your AI assistants.
conversations.empty.searchDescription: Try a different search term or filter.
conversations.detail.title: Conversation details
conversations.detail.deleteDescription: This will permanently delete this conversation and all its messages. This action cannot be undone.
memory.title: Memory
memory.subtitle: View and manage stored memories.
memory.selectInstancePrompt: Select an agent to view its memories
memory.empty.title: No memories yet
memory.empty.description: Memories will appear here as the assistant interacts with users.
memory.empty.searchDescription: Try a different search term or filter.
memory.deleteDescription: This will permanently delete this memory. This action cannot be undone.
memory.create.title: Add memory
memory.create.description: Manually add a memory for an agent.
memory.create.contentPlaceholder: e.g. The user lives in Rome and prefers Italian
memory.banner.openaiNeedsKey: Memory requires an OpenAI API key. Configure it in Settings → AI Provider.
memory.banner.bedrockNeedsAws: Memory with Bedrock requires AWS credentials. Configure them in Settings → AI Provider.
memory.banner.anthropicNeedsOpenAI: Memory with Anthropic requires an OpenAI API key for embeddings.
memory.wipe.title: Provider change will delete memory & knowledge
memory.wipe.body: Switching to {provider} changes the embedding model. Existing embeddings cannot be converted, so ALL memories and the ENTIRE knowledge base for this instance will be permanently deleted. Conversations are not affected. This cannot be undone.
settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure system settings.
instances.title: Agents
instances.subtitle: Manage your AI agents
instances.empty.title: No agents yet
instances.empty.description: Create your first AI agent to get started.
instances.table.name: Name
instances.create.title: Create new agent
instances.create.descriptionPlaceholder: Briefly describe what this assistant does
instances.create.reviewDescription: Confirm the details for your new agent.
instances.create.reviewInfo: This agent will be created with default prompts, tools and skills. You can customize everything after creation.
instances.detail.deleteDescription: This will permanently delete "{name}" and all its configuration. This action cannot be undone.
general.name: Name
general.slugHelp: The slug cannot be changed after creation.
general.statusHelp: Inactive agents are hidden from the API.
general.iconHelp: Upload a square image (128x128). PNG, JPEG, or WebP.
general.iconInvalidType: Invalid file type. Use PNG, JPEG, or WebP.
general.iconTooLarge: File too large. Maximum size is 5 MB.
prompts.description: System prompt sections that define your assistant's behavior. Edit each section individually.
tools.description: Enable or disable tools available to this assistant.
tools.memoryDisabledHint: Enable the Memory layer in the Settings tab to use this tool.
tools.knowledgeDisabledHint: Enable the Knowledge Base in the Settings tab to use this tool.
skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Manage your global skills library.
skills.table.name: Name
skills.deleteDescription: This will permanently remove "{name}" from the library. This action cannot be undone.
skills.form.name: Name
skills.form.descriptionPlaceholder: Brief description of what this skill does
skills.tab.empty: No skills available. Create skills first, then assign them to agents.
skills.tab.description: Select which skills this assistant can use.
skills.tab.autoLoadTooltip: Inject skill content directly into the system prompt
capabilities.description: Manage tools and skills available to this assistant.
capabilities.disableToolConfirmDescripti: This tool is required by skill "{skill}". Disabling it will also disable the skill.
skills.env.title: Configure {name}
skills.env.description: Set the required environment variables for this skill.
skills.env.placeholderSet: Value is set (leave empty to keep)
skills.env.noVars: This skill has no required environment variables.
playground.title: Playground
playground.noConversationsHint: Start a new chat to begin
playground.emptyHint: Select an agent and start chatting.
analytics.latency.noData: No latency data yet. Traces will appear after the first conversation.
analytics.noData: No data available for this period.
settings.tab.title: Agent Settings
settings.tab.aiModelHelp: Choose the AI provider and model for this agent.
settings.tab.pricingClickHint: Click a row to select that provider and model.
settings.tab.pricingNote: Prices are in USD per million tokens. Actual costs may vary by region and service tier.
settings.tab.apiKeysHelp: Configure the API keys for the selected provider.
settings.tab.awsCredentialsHelp: Configure AWS credentials for Bedrock. If not set, the system will use the local AWS profile (~/.aws/credentials) or IAM role.
settings.tab.awsFallbackNote: If credentials are not configured, the system will attempt to use the local AWS profile or IAM role.
settings.tab.memoryHelp: Enable automatic memory extraction and recall for this assistant.
settings.tab.thinkingHelp: Enable extended reasoning on capable models. Increases output quality and cost. The toggle is hidden when the selected model does not support extended thinking.
settings.tab.memoryOpenaiWarning: Memory requires an OpenAI API key for embeddings, even when using Anthropic or Bedrock as the AI provider.
settings.tab.knowledgeHelp: Enable the RAG knowledge base to search information from uploaded documents.
settings.tab.knowledgeOpenaiWarning: Knowledge base requires an OpenAI API key for embeddings, even when using Anthropic or Bedrock as the AI provider.
settings.tab.toolSecretsHelp: API keys required by the tools enabled for this agent. Disable unused tools to remove their secret requirements.
settings.tab.noToolSecrets: No enabled tools require additional API keys.
settings.tab.keyPlaceholderSet: Key is set (leave empty to keep)
settings.tab.authHelp: When enabled, the OpenAI-compatible API endpoint requires a Bearer token to access this agent.
settings.tab.authKeyPlaceholder: Enter API key for this agent
settings.tab.langsmithHelp: Enable LangSmith tracing to monitor AI calls for this agent.
settings.tab.removeKeyDescription: This will remove the stored key. The feature may stop working until a new key is provided.
settings.tab.sttHelp: Provider for transcribing incoming voice messages. OpenAI uses the already-configured key; AWS uses Bedrock credentials; Deepgram requires a dedicated key in secrets.
channels.tab.title: Communication Channels
channels.tab.description: Configure messaging integrations for this agent. Each channel connects a platform to this AI agent.
channels.tab.telegramHelp: Connect a Telegram bot to this agent.
channels.tab.telegramAllowedUserIdsHelp: Comma-separated Telegram user IDs. Leave empty to allow all.
channels.tab.slackHelp: Connect a Slack bot to this agent using Socket Mode.
channels.tab.whatsappHelp: Connect via Twilio WhatsApp Business API.
channels.tab.removeDescription: This will stop the channel and remove its configuration.
channels.tab.agentHelp: Allows other agents to invoke this one via the virtual 'agent' channel. No configuration required.
knowledge.tab.description: Manage the knowledge base documents for this assistant. Documents are automatically chunked and embedded for RAG search.
knowledge.tab.uploadDescription: Upload a text document to the knowledge base. It will be automatically chunked and embedded for search.
knowledge.tab.deleteDescription: This will permanently delete "{name}" and all its chunks. This action cannot be undone.
knowledge.tab.emptyHint: Upload documents to build the assistant's knowledge base.
knowledge.tab.viewDescription: Original document content stored in the knowledge base.
knowledge.tab.processingTimeout: Document processing timed out. The document may have failed to process.
triggers.scheduled.invalidInterval: Please enter a valid interval value
scheduledTasks.title: Scheduled Tasks
scheduledTasks.description: Automate recurring or one-time tasks for this agent.
scheduledTasks.empty: No scheduled tasks yet. Create one to automate recurring work.
scheduledTasks.dialogDescription: Configure a task that runs automatically on a schedule.
scheduledTasks.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
scheduledTasks.col.name: Name
scheduledTasks.form.name: Name
scheduledTasks.form.promptPlaceholder: What should the agent do when this task runs?
scheduledTasks.form.cronHelp: Standard 5-field cron (min hour day month weekday). E.g.: 0 9 * * 1-5 = weekdays at 9:00
scheduledTasks.form.outboundChannelHelp: Send the task output to a channel. The conversation can be continued from that channel.
scheduledTasks.form.outboundTargetPlaceh: Chat ID, user ID, or channel ID
scheduledTasks.form.keepHistoryHelp: When enabled, the task accumulates context across executions and replies from the channel continue the same conversation. When disabled, each execution starts fresh.
scheduledTasks.runs.title: Execution Log
skills.detail.requiredToolsHint: Tools that will be auto-enabled when this skill is activated on an agent.
skills.detail.changelogPlaceholder: Describe what changed in this version...
skills.detail.settings.archiveDescriptio: This will hide the skill from the library. Agents using it will continue to work.
room.empty.title: Room not configured
room.empty.description: Configure a Room to enable event-driven workflows with human-in-the-loop.
room.config.title: Room Configuration
room.config.promptHelp: The mandate for this room: objectives, rules, and behavior instructions.
room.config.promptPlaceholder: e.g. You are a proactive assistant. When events arrive, use the available tools to retrieve details by objectId and take action accordingly.
room.config.outboundTargetHelp: Slack channel ID, WhatsApp number, or Telegram chat ID
room.sources.title: Event Sources
room.sources.name: Source Name
room.sources.rotateConfirm: This will invalidate the current webhook URL. Are you sure?
room.definitions.title: Event Definitions
room.definitions.name: Definition Name
room.definitions.matchingPromptHelp: Describe what events should match (evaluated by AI)
room.definitions.matchingPromptPlacehold: e.g. A new deal was created or updated in the CRM
room.definitions.interpretationPromptHel: Instructions for the Room agent on how to handle matched events
room.definitions.interpretationPromptPla: e.g. Retrieve the deal details using the objectId and send a summary to the team
room.definitions.contextPromptHelp: System prompt template for the triggered conversation. Use {{payload}} for the full payload or {{payload.field}} for specific fields.
room.backlog.title: Event Backlog
room.activity.title: Activity Log
auditLog.title: Tool Traces
auditLog.subtitle: Track tool actions across all agents.
auditLog.empty.title: No audit logs yet
auditLog.empty.description: Tool audit entries will appear here once tools are used.
auditLog.empty.searchDescription: Try adjusting your filters or search query.
login.title: Polyant
login.subtitle: Sign in to the management panel
users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Manage who can access this admin panel
users.empty.title: No users
users.empty.description: Create the first user to get started.
users.table.name: Name
users.create.title: Create user
users.create.description: Create a new user. If you don't provide a password, one will be generated.
users.create.passwordHint: Leave empty to generate one automatically.
users.edit.title: Edit user
users.delete.title: Delete user?
users.delete.description: The user will be permanently removed. This cannot be undone.
users.reset.title: Reset password
users.reset.description: A new temporary password will be generated. The user must change it on next login.
users.reset.shownOnce: This password is shown only once. Copy it and hand it to the user.
users.created.shownOnce: Save this password: the user will need it for first login and must change it. It will not be shown again.
settings.password.title: Change password
settings.password.forced.title: Set a new password
settings.password.forced.description: For security reasons you must change your password before continuing.
settings.password.sameAsPrevious: The new password must be different from the current one
exportImport.export.title: Export Configuration
exportImport.export.description: Download all configuration for this agent as a JSON file. Secrets and credentials are excluded.
exportImport.import.title: Import Configuration
exportImport.import.description: Overwrite this agent's configuration from a previously exported JSON file. Secrets and channel credentials will need to be reconfigured.
exportImport.import.confirmDescription: This will overwrite the current configuration. Secrets and channel credentials will not be changed. Continue?
exportImport.import.warningsDescription: The import completed with the following warnings:
exportImport.import.noWarnings: Import completed successfully with no warnings.
exportImport.importNew.title: Import Agent
exportImport.importNew.description: Create a new agent from an exported JSON file.
exportImport.skills.export.title: Export Skill Catalog
exportImport.skills.export.description: Download all skills and their versions as a JSON file.
exportImport.skills.import.title: Import Skill Catalog
exportImport.skills.import.description: Import skills from a previously exported JSON file. Existing skills will be updated if newer versions are found.
activityStream.title: Activity
activityStream.subtitle: Real-time agent activity log.
activityStream.filter.title: Filter by agent
